assertions: D1 - Asserted no 'not eligible' block displayed

vision_verdict: pass. The page is a fully functional-looking dashboard interface. It features a complete navigational sidebar with categorized links (Admin Controls, Academic Space), a language/theme toggle section, and a user profile with token tracking. The main content area contains an active sandbox notification banner, a header for the "Interactive Knowledge Library," tabbed navigation for different vaults, and a content card ("All Libraries") that includes descriptive text and an item count. The layout is structured, responsive, and contains interactive UI elements, indicating it is a complete, rendered web application interface rather than a placeholder or mockup.
